{{Infobox character
| name = Artur Belfry
| aliases = Artur
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Imperial Witness, Chronicler}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|tutor, Chronicler}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Artur Belfry Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur Belfry is an [[Imperial]] Witness hailing from the [[Aurelian Heartlands]]. Serving as a Chronicler, he is responsible for observing, reading, and documenting the history of the Empire before sharing that information with others. He carries candles on his belt to assist in his duties. Artur works alongside his brother, [[Vorus Belfry]], who serves as a [[Silent One]] to act as both a protector and a guide; [[Vorus]] maintains his title by keeping his mouth covered to signify he will not reveal secrets. Physically, Artur is an exceptionally large man, standing nearly seven feet tall with a massive build that belies his scholarly profession. Despite his role as a historian, he has occasionally been required to engage in physical combat during his career. He has also provided confidential reports for the [[Blackwatch]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur Belfry serves as an [[Imperial]] Witness and a Chronicler tasked with reading and recording the history of the Empire. In his role as a tutor, he provided lectures and various teachings to [[Calder]] [[Marten]] while possessing a copy of [[Sadesthenes’ From Rising Sun to Setting Moon]]. Though he is a person known to Alsa, his duties also include writing confidential reports for the [[Blackwatch]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Artur Belfry]] is an [[Imperial]] Witness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Artur Belfry]] is the Chronicler who Reads and records [[Imperial]] history.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur is a tutor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur is a Chronicler.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur holds a copy of [[Sadesthenes’ From Rising Sun to Setting Moon]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur provided teachings to [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur lectured [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Artur is a person known to Alsa.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Artur Belfry]] is an [[Imperial]] Witness who wrote a confidential report for the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“So, children, let’s get to know one another. You are both familiar with the works of Sadesthenes, yes?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
